# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: keyVault
    type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults@2021-11-01-preview
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01-preview
    location: 'West US'
    skuName: 'standard'
    kind: 'tiered'
    properties:
      enabledForDeployment: true

  - name: keyVaultIdentity
    type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities@2018-11-30
    apiVersion: 2018-11-30
    location: 'West US'
    skuName: 'Standard'

  - name: keyVaultAccessPolicy1
    type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accessPolicies@2021-11-01-preview
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01-preview
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults", "keyVault")]'
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities", "keyVaultIdentity")]'
    properties:
      identity:
        userAssignedIdentities:
          '[resourceId("Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities", "keyVaultIdentity")]' 
      accessPolicies:
        - tenantId: 'your-tenant-id'
          objectId: 'application-object-id'
          secretPermissions:
            - Get
            - List
        - objectId: 'service-principal-object-id'
          secretPermissions:
            - Get
            - List

  - name: keyVaultAccessPolicy2
    type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accessPolicies@2021-11-01-preview
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01-preview
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults", "keyVault")]'
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities", "keyVaultIdentity")]'
    properties:
      identity:
        userAssignedIdentities:
          '[resourceId("Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities", "keyVaultIdentity")]' 
      accessPolicies:
        - tenantId: 'your-tenant-id'
          objectId: 'application-object-id'
          secretPermissions:
            - Get
            - List
        - objectId: 'service-principal-object-id'
          secretPermissions:
            - Get
            - List

outputs:
  keyVaultName: '[reference(resourceId("Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults", "keyVault"), providerNamespace).name]'
